description: Sync Gorgias eCommerce customer support tickets, customers, tags, macros, and satisfaction surveys.

install_fields.label: Gorgias Account (subdomain)
install_fields.help: Your Gorgias subdomain — the part before .gorgias.com (e.g. mystore).

install_fields.label: Email
install_fields.help: The email address associated with your Gorgias account.

install_fields.label: API Key
install_fields.help: Generate an API key in Gorgias → Settings → REST API.

auth_details.notes: Gorgias uses standard HTTP Basic Auth. Username = email, Password = API key.
